title: lucuma ramiflora
intro: Lucuma ramiflora, also known as the lucuma tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Sapindaceae family and is native to the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Lucuma ramiflora include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of consuming Lucuma ramiflora include improving digestion, reducing stress, and providing a natural source of energy. Lucuma ramiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extract is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
